diagrams.title: Multiple Inheritance Syntax
diagrams.description: Shows the basic syntax of multiple inheritance with two base classes
diagrams.purpose: Understanding syntax structure for declaring multiple inheritance

diagrams.title: Diamond Problem Illustration
diagrams.description: Diamond-shaped inheritance hierarchy without virtual inheritance showing two copies of base class
elements: Two arrows from D to B and C
Two separate paths from D to A
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the diamond problem and how ambiguity arises

diagrams.title: Virtual Inheritance Solution
diagrams.description: Diamond hierarchy with virtual inheritance showing single shared base class
elements: Class D (inherits from B and C)
Single virtual base A shared between B and C
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how virtual inheritance solves diamond problem

diagrams.title: Constructor Destructor Order
diagrams.description: Timeline diagram showing order of constructor and destructor calls in multiple inheritance
elements: Arrows showing reverse order for destructors
